falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5600 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern implied a lower low or extended consolidation; a breakout to new highs invalidates the structural bottom thesis and suggests the pattern match was a false positive

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 40 and bottom pattern both imply elevated volatility persistence; sustained VIX compression into complacency zone contradicts the expected post-bottom volatility regime

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 2+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug analog occurred during a rates-driven repricing; a sharp flight-to-quality bid of that magnitude without equity follow-through suggests macro deterioration beyond the pattern's scope, invalidating the recovery call

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
